seo.title: Expert Carpenter in Mesquite, TX | Zetino Carpenter Inc
seo.description: Zetino Carpenter Inc offers professional carpentry services in Mesquite, TX. From custom trim to full remodels, we deliver quality craftsmanship. Call (469) 200-6922 for a free estimate.

hero.headline: Custom Carpentry That Elevates Your Home
hero.subheadline: From intricate crown molding to sturdy decks, we bring your vision to life with precision and care.

featureSections.title: Transform Your Interiors with Elegant Woodwork
featureSections.body: Our custom trim and molding services add character and value to any room. We specialize in crown molding, baseboards, wainscoting, and more, tailored to your style.
bullets: Wide selection of wood species and profiles
Enhances property value and curb appeal
featureSections.cardBody: Installed intricate crown molding and custom window casings, transforming a plain room into an elegant space.

featureSections.title: Build Your Dream Deck or Patio Cover
featureSections.body: Extend your living space outdoors with a custom deck, pergola, or patio cover. We use durable materials and expert techniques to create lasting beauty.
bullets: Custom designs for any backyard layout
featureSections.cardBody: Designed and built a multi-level deck with integrated benches and planters, perfect for entertaining.

whyChooseUs.title: Locally Owned & Operated
whyChooseUs.description: We're proud to serve Mesquite and surrounding areas with a personal touch and deep community roots.

whyChooseUs.title: Attention to Detail
whyChooseUs.description: Every cut, joint, and finish is meticulously crafted to exceed expectations.

whyChooseUs.title: Reliable & Punctual
whyChooseUs.description: We respect your time and property, showing up on schedule and cleaning up after every job.

whyChooseUs.title: Free, No-Obligation Estimates
whyChooseUs.description: Get a detailed quote upfront with no hidden fees or surprises.

cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free estimate and let's bring your vision to life.

servicesPage.intro: From custom cabinetry to outdoor structures, our comprehensive carpentry services are designed to enhance your home's beauty and functionality. Every project is handled with precision, quality materials, and a commitment to your satisfaction.

services.title: Custom Cabinetry
services.shortDescription: Bespoke cabinets for kitchens, bathrooms, and more, built to your exact specifications.
services.longDescription: Our custom cabinetry service delivers handcrafted cabinets that maximize storage and elevate your space. We work with you to design the perfect layout, choose premium woods, and ensure flawless installation. Whether you need a complete kitchen remodel or a custom entertainment center, we bring your vision to life.
benefits: Tailored designs to fit any space
Soft-close hinges and drawers for durability

process.title: Consultation & Design
process.description: We meet with you to discuss your needs, measure your space, and create a custom design plan.

process.title: Crafting & Assembly
process.description: Our skilled team builds your cabinets in-shop using premium materials and time-honored techniques.

process.title: Professional Installation
process.description: We install your cabinets with precision, ensuring level alignment and seamless integration.

faqs.question: What types of wood do you use for cabinets?
faqs.answer: We offer a variety of hardwoods including oak, maple, cherry, and walnut, as well as premium plywood options.

faqs.question: How long does a custom cabinet project take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary depending on complexity, but most projects are completed within 4-6 weeks from design approval.

services.title: Trim & Molding
services.shortDescription: Add elegance with crown molding, baseboards, wainscoting, and custom trim.
services.longDescription: Our trim and molding services bring architectural detail to any room. We specialize in crown molding, chair rails, picture frames, and custom wainscoting. Our precise miter cuts and seamless joints create a polished, high-end look that transforms ordinary spaces into extraordinary ones.
benefits: Wide range of profiles and styles

process.title: Design Selection
process.description: We help you choose molding profiles and layout that complement your home's style.

process.title: Precision Cutting & Fitting
process.description: Our team cuts each piece with exact measurements for tight, gap-free joints.

process.title: Finishing Touches
process.description: We sand, caulk, and prepare the surface for painting or staining, leaving a flawless finish.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim in my home?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate existing profiles or create custom designs to match your current trim.

faqs.question: Do you paint the trim as well?
faqs.answer: We can install trim ready for paint or provide a painted finish upon request.

services.title: Deck & Porch Building
services.shortDescription: Custom outdoor living spaces built to last with quality materials.
services.longDescription: Create your ideal outdoor retreat with a custom deck, porch, or pergola. We design and build structures that blend with your home's architecture and landscape. Using pressure-treated lumber, composite decking, or tropical hardwoods, we ensure durability and beauty for years to come.

process.title: Site Assessment & Design
process.description: We evaluate your yard, discuss your vision, and create a detailed plan with material options.

process.title: Foundation & Framing
process.description: Our team installs a solid foundation and frames the structure to code for safety and longevity.

process.title: Decking & Finishing
process.description: We lay decking boards, install railings, and apply protective sealant for a beautiful finish.

faqs.question: Do you use composite or wood decking?
faqs.answer: We offer both options. Wood is traditional and cost-effective, while composite is low-maintenance and longer-lasting.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a deck?
faqs.answer: A typical deck project takes 1-2 weeks, depending on size and complexity.

services.title: General Carpentry & Repairs
services.shortDescription: From door repairs to shelving, we handle all your woodwork needs.
services.longDescription: Our general carpentry services cover a wide range of repairs and installations. Whether you need a door hung, shelves installed, or damaged woodwork repaired, we have the expertise to get the job done right. We treat every project, big or small, with the same dedication to quality.
benefits: Expert installation of fixtures and hardware
Fixes for squeaky floors, sticky doors, and more

process.title: Diagnosis & Estimate
process.description: We inspect the issue, provide a clear explanation, and give a fixed price quote.

process.title: Repair or Installation
process.description: Our carpenter performs the work efficiently, using proper techniques and materials.

process.title: Cleanup & Final Check
process.description: We clean the work area and ensure everything functions perfectly before leaving.

faqs.question: Do you do small repair jobs?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! No job is too small. We handle everything from fixing a cabinet door to patching wood rot.

faqs.question: Can you match existing wood finishes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can match stains and paints to blend repairs seamlessly with your existing woodwork.

about.headline: Crafting Quality Since 2008
about.mission: To provide Mesquite and surrounding communities with exceptional carpentry services that combine traditional craftsmanship with modern techniques, ensuring every project adds beauty and value to your home.
story: Zetino Carpenter Inc was founded by Juan Zetino, a master carpenter with over 15 years of experience. Starting as a solo contractor, Juan built a reputation for meticulous work and honest service. What began as small repair jobs for neighbors grew into a full-service carpentry business serving homeowners throughout Mesquite, TX.

Today, our team continues that legacy. We take pride in every cut, joint, and finish, treating each home as if it were our own. Our commitment to quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction has made us a trusted name in local carpentry.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We believe in doing the job right the first time, using time-honored techniques and the best materials.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest pricing, clear communication, and respecting your home are the foundations of our business.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your vision guides our work. We listen, advise, and deliver results that exceed expectations.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: As a local business, we're invested in making Mesquite a better place to live, one project at a time.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Estimate Today
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Call or fill out the form below, and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
